# Gad Sosa — llms.txt

> A machine-readable summary of Gad Sosa and this site, designed for AI crawlers and LLM retrieval.

## Person

- **Name:** Gad Sosa
- **Current role:** VP R&D at DeepKeep
- **Location:** Israel (remote-friendly)
- **Tagline:** Technology executive with 20+ years leading software R&D and machine-learning security. I build products people trust — and the lean R&D organizations that keep shipping them.
- **Short bio:** Gad Sosa is a VP R&D and technology executive with 20+ years leading software organizations, AI/ML from model development to GPU-backed production systems, and ML security. He has held leadership roles at DeepKeep, Informatica, ActiveTrail, Brio/Dell, and MSN Israel.

## Core expertise

- VP R&D / CTO leadership
- AI and ML from research to production
- GPU orchestration and cluster management
- Low-latency inference and production ML systems
- ML security and adversarial ML
- R&D turnaround and engineering team scaling
- AI-driven engineering and engineering productivity
- SaaS architecture and cloud infrastructure

## Career highlights

- VP R&D at DeepKeep — leading ML security products, publications, patents, and conference talks
- Senior Engineering Manager at Informatica
- VP R&D & CTO at ActiveTrail — rebuilt data infrastructure, security, and delivery for a high-scale SaaS platform
- Founder & CTO at Brio Software — led software design for the Dell Networking X-Series Switch
- Director of R&D at MSN Israel

## Engagement model

Gad takes on:

1. Full-time executive roles (VP R&D / CTO)
2. Committed, multi-month engagements for R&D turnaround, AI/ML productionization, or engineering scaling
